summary: Onboarding & League Management Testing (Milestone 1-3) - 11 backend tests PASSED (100%), frontend flows working correctly. New user onboarding with language selector, 3 league paths (National paid, Create Private, Join Private), league creation with invite codes, and league list all functional. Admin dashboard routing issue identified.

routing_issues.issue: Admin dashboard shows 'Unmatched Route' 404 error - Expo Router catches /admin before backend can serve HTML admin dashboard
routing_issues.workaround: Backend admin HTML exists at GET /admin endpoint in server.py but not accessible through Expo app routing
routing_issues.recommendation: Either: 1) Exclude /admin from Expo Router app directory, 2) Create separate admin route outside Expo app, or 3) Create admin screen within Expo app that loads backend admin HTML in WebView

action_items: Fix /admin routing: Admin dashboard HTML not accessible through frontend URL - Expo Router intercepts the route
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ All backend league management APIs functional and properly secured
✓ Onboarding screen correctly shows logo, language selector (IT/EN flags), and 3 path cards
✓ Language selector is functional - switches between Italian and English with flag icons
✓ Create private league flow works: modal → name input → success screen with invite code
✓ Invite codes displayed prominently in large, bold text (e.g., KX7ZR64H)
✓ League list shows all user leagues with member_count, active badge, and share buttons
✓ All testID attributes correctly implemented on interactive elements
✓ Dark theme consistently applied (#0F172A background, #F5A623 accent)
✓ Mobile-first design working correctly (390x844 viewport tested)
✓ POST /api/leagues/join with code AMICI2024 works correctly
✓ GET /api/leagues returns leagues with member_count field
✓ GET /api/leagues/national returns national leagues (1 league found)
✓ Admin GET /api/admin/matchdays returns matchdays with admin token
✓ Admin GET /api/admin/matches returns 11 seeded matches for demo matchday
⚠ Admin dashboard HTML at /admin route caught by Expo Router - shows 404 'Unmatched Route'

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (onboarding, league creation, league list all working, admin dashboard routing issue)

seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded data: marco@test.com, admin@fantapronostic.com, AMICI2024 private league code, 11 matches in matchday. Created test users dynamically for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Onboarding and league management fully functional. Backend APIs all working (11/11 tests pass). Frontend flows tested: register → onboarding screen with logo, language selector (IT/EN flags functional), 3 path cards (National €20 paid, Create Private free, Join Private). Create league shows success screen with invite code (e.g., KX7ZR64H) prominently displayed. League list shows leagues with member_count, active badge, invite codes with share buttons. Only issue: /admin route shows Expo Router 404 'Unmatched Route' - backend admin HTML exists but Expo Router intercepts the route before backend can serve it.

tests: test_register_new_user_returns_tokens - Returns access_token, refresh_token, user object with email, username, language
test_new_user_has_empty_leagues - New user GET /api/leagues returns empty array (triggers onboarding)
test_create_private_league - POST /api/leagues creates private league, returns id, name, invite_code (8 chars), league_type='private', member_count=1
test_join_private_league_with_code - POST /api/leagues/join with AMICI2024 returns league object, verified in user's league list
test_get_user_leagues_with_member_count - GET /api/leagues returns leagues array with member_count for each league
test_get_national_leagues - GET /api/leagues/national returns 1 national league with member_count
test_admin_get_matchdays - GET /api/admin/matchdays with admin token returns 1 matchday
test_complete_league_flow - User1 creates league → gets invite code → User2 joins with code → member_count increases to 2

rca_of_issue.issue: Admin dashboard at /admin shows Expo Router 404 'Unmatched Route'
rca_of_issue.root_cause: Expo Router's file-based routing intercepts the /admin route before the backend can serve the HTML admin dashboard. The backend has a valid GET /admin endpoint (server.py lines 1249-1252) that returns HTML, but when accessed through the frontend URL (https://modular-routes-13.preview.emergentagent.com/admin), Expo Router looks for app/admin.tsx or app/admin/index.tsx and returns 404 'Unmatched Route' instead of proxying to backend.
reproduction_steps: 2. Expo Router processes the route and looks for app/admin.tsx
3. File not found, Expo Router returns 404 'Unmatched Route' error screen
mitigation_options: Option 1: Create app/admin/index.tsx that uses WebView to load backend admin HTML
Option 2: Move admin dashboard to /api/admin path (but this requires backend route change)
Option 3: Create admin screen within Expo app (React Native components instead of HTML)
Option 4: Document that admin dashboard should be accessed via direct backend URL if available
rca_of_issue.recommended_solution: Option 1 - Create app/admin/index.tsx with WebView component that loads backend admin HTML. This preserves the existing backend admin dashboard while making it accessible through Expo app routing.
